title: Squad Execution Protocol (SEP) Log
description: Formal schema for SEP C1 Execution Log entries written by all claude-tech-squad skills to ai-docs/.squad-log/. Files are Markdown with YAML frontmatter; this schema describes the required frontmatter fields.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution run (short alphanumeric slug).

skill.description: Name of the skill that produced this log.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the skill completed.

final_status.description: Terminal state of the skill execution.

execution_mode.description: How the skill was executed. 'inline' = Claude Code subagent; 'tmux' = separate tmux pane teammate.

architecture_style.description: Architecture style detected by preflight. 'n/a' for skills that do not run architecture detection.

checkpoints.description: Ordered list of checkpoints completed during this execution.

fallbacks_invoked.description: List of fallback invocations that occurred. Empty array if none.

parent_run_id.description: run_id of the parent skill execution that triggered this one (e.g. discovery → implement).

runtime_policy_version.description: Version of runtime-policy.yaml active during this execution.

docs_lookup_mode.description: Documentation lookup mode used during this run.

agent_results.description: Per-agent result summaries (optional, populated by orchestrator skills).

retry_count.description: Number of retry cycles consumed during this execution.

checkpoint_cursor.description: Last checkpoint reached — used as resume cursor.

resume_from.description: Checkpoint to resume from on restart. null or 'none' if full run.

gates_blocked.description: Gates that blocked (required user confirmation) during this run.

teammate_reliability.description: Per-teammate reliability classification for this run.

implement_triggered.description: Whether /implement was triggered from this /discovery run. (discovery only)

release_result.description: Release gate result. (squad or release only)

postmortem_recommended.description: Whether a postmortem was recommended after this hotfix.

findings_critical.description: Count of CRITICAL severity findings. (security-audit only)

findings_high.description: Count of HIGH severity findings. (security-audit only)

vulnerabilities_critical.description: Count of critical CVEs found. (dependency-check only)

major_updates.description: Count of major version updates available. (dependency-check only)

remediation_artifact.description: Path to remediation file produced by this run. (security-audit, dependency-check)
